commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to decide whether to accept the built-in XCP-ng provider scope and security/resource-deletion boundary.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain defect was found in the diff; the remaining security-boundary question is maintainer acceptance of credentialed XAPI lifecycle and deletion behavior. (sha=3ab9263e35432ce029cea8cc6af03fb4fc607d41)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a built-in direct XCP-ng SSH-lease provider with config/env/flag plumbing, XAPI lifecycle/cleanup/doctor code, docs, tests, a guarded live-smoke script, and a few adjacent hardening fixes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new provider feature, not a reported bug. The PR discussion does include a high-confidence live-smoke proof path for the new behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to decide whether to accept the built-in XCP-ng provider scope and security/resource-deletion boundary.

target.title: feat(provider): add XCP-ng provider
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an XCP-ng provider with VM clone, config-drive, SSH readiness, stop/release, cleanup, and doctor support.
- Add XCP-ng configuration parsing, provider registration, docs, command help references, and changelog coverage.
- Add focused tests for provider config, lifecycle behavior, Xen API client handling, redaction, cloud-init/config-drive content, and cleanup edge cases.

## Related

- Addresses https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/217
- Follows up on https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/217#issuecomment-4637370969

## Verification

- `go test -race ./...`

## Notes

- Live XCP-ng smoke coverage is exposed through `scripts/xcpng-live-smoke.sh` and requires local XCP-ng configuration/credentials.
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
